title: 「Everywhere / Anywhere」句型
titleZh: 「Everywhere / Anywhere」表達所有地方或任何地方
titleEn: Using everywhere and anywhere for place
formula: Subject + be / verb + everywhere / anywhere + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + be / verb + everywhere (+ place phrase)
Subject + auxiliary / modal + (not) + verb + anywhere (+ place phrase)
Everywhere / Anywhere + subject + verb, + main clause

example: Labubu used to be popular; it was everywhere. You could see it anywhere you went.
exampleZh: Labubu 以前很流行，到處都看得到；你幾乎去到哪裏都會見到它。

examples.en: Labubu used to be popular; it was everywhere. You could see it anywhere you went.
examples.zh: Labubu 以前很流行，到處都看得到；你幾乎去到哪裏都會見到它。
examples.highlight: it was everywhere. You could see it anywhere you went

meaning.zh: Everywhere 表示所有地方都包括；anywhere 表示任何一個地方、自由選擇或在否定句中表示任何地方都沒有。

rules.zh: Everywhere 表示「所有地方都包括」，通常用於肯定句。
Anywhere 表示任何一個地方，常用於疑問、否定、自由選擇和不論地點的句子。

rules.en: Do not confuse everywhere and anywhere in ordinary affirmative statements.
rules.zh: 普通肯定句中不要混淆 everywhere 和 anywhere。
examples: You can put the toys anywhere.

rules.en: Do not normally put to, in or at directly before them.
rules.zh: 它們本身表示地點或目的地時，前面通常不直接加 to、in 或 at。

rules.en: Anywhere may be followed by an adjective or clause.
rules.zh: Anywhere 後面可以直接加形容詞或子句。

rules.en: Not anywhere and not everywhere have different meanings.
rules.zh: Not anywhere 表示完全沒有；not everywhere 表示並非每一處都有。

rules.en: Write everywhere and anywhere as one word.
rules.zh: Everywhere 和 anywhere 都寫成一個字。

benefits.en: It clearly distinguishes all places from any place.
benefits.zh: 它能清楚分辨「全部地方」和「任何地方」。
它能把 any place 或 every place 的較長說法縮短。

benefits.en: It makes questions and negatives more natural.
benefits.zh: Anywhere 能自然地詢問位置或表示完全找不到。

benefits.en: It expresses regardless of place easily.
benefits.zh: 它方便表達「無論去到哪裏」。

benefits.en: It adds variety to sentence openings.
benefits.zh: 把地點範圍放在句首可增加句式變化。

en: Rewrite each sentence using everywhere or anywhere.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 everywhere 或 anywhere 改寫以下句子。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Posters could be seen in every part of the classroom.
questions.promptZh: 課室的每一處都看得到海報。
questions.answer: Posters could be seen everywhere in the classroom.
questions.answerZh: 課室裏到處都看得到海報。
questions.highlight: Posters could be seen everywhere in the classroom.

questions.prompt: You may choose any place in the room to sit.
questions.promptZh: 你可以選擇房間內任何一個位置坐下。
questions.answer: You may sit anywhere in the room.
questions.answerZh: 你可以坐在房間內任何位置。
questions.highlight: You may sit anywhere in the room.

questions.prompt: I searched every possible place for my keys.
questions.promptZh: 我找遍了所有可能的地方尋找鎖匙。
